emails.subject: FW: Master Gas Agr. for Yazoo
emails.body: FW: Master Gas Agr. for Yazoo Kay, the natives are getting restless. It looks like this master may need to take the lead in getting attention. Thanks, Reagan C. Rorschach Enron North America 1400 Smith Street Houston, Texas 77002 713.345.3363 To: Rorschach, Reagan; Fairley, David; Will, Lloyd; Coulter, Kayne; Mann, Kay; Gilbert, Gerald

emails.subject: Re: FW: Master Gas Agr. for Yazoo
emails.body: Re: FW: Master Gas Agr. for Yazoo I figured it would. The master is now in the hands (or on the email) of Stacy Dickson, one of the gas lawyers. Let's see if we hear anything by noon. Kay

emails.subject: Re: FW: Master Gas Agr. for Yazoo
emails.body: Re: FW: Master Gas Agr. for Yazoo ps. You might warn Bob P. that this is coming, and needs top attention. We can send it to his lawyer at the same time, if he wants. I think it is someone other than David, though. Can you find out who he wants to receive the draft? Thanks, Kay
